## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Bessemer Venture Partners and GrowthX to discuss GrowthX's AI-powered marketing agency and explore potential investment opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has rapidly grown to $6M ARR in 2.5 months, recently closed Series A, and is profitable with software margins](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Marcel Santilli's background in content-led marketing strategies at IBM, HP, and other tech companies led to the creation of GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [There's high demand for AI-powered marketing services that deliver outcomes without requiring large in-house teams](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [GrowthX's success is driven by word-of-mouth referrals and Marcel's expertise in building organic content engines](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

## Topics

### Marcel Santilli's Background and GrowthX Origin

  - [Brazilian-born, moved to Texas at 11](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Career at IBM, HP, HashiCorp, ServiceTitan, Skale AI, DeepGram](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Launched successful content sites: SecurityIntelligence.com (17M closed deals, 57M pipeline in first year) and TechBeacon.com (1M monthly visitors)](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Key strategy: Hiring editors/journalists instead of marketers, building contributor networks](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Personal challenges (IVF journey, health issues) led to reset and focus on building AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Started with workshops (170 attendees, $500 each), evolved into service due to demand](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Quit job after landing $27K/month deal with Anthropic](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)

### GrowthX's Rapid Growth

  - [Hit $6M ARR in 2.5 months](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Closed Series A funding round](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [Profitable with software margins](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Growth primarily through word-of-mouth referrals](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Partnerships with notable clients (logos on website)](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)

### Market Demand for AI-Powered Marketing Services

  - [Marketing leaders want smaller, high-quality teams](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Frustration with traditional agencies and freelancers](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [AI tools alone don't solve workflow issues](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [Teams lack time/expertise to maximize AI tool potential](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [High demand for trusted experts delivering outcomes with AI-powered solutions](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)

### Bessemer Venture Partners' Interest

  - [Focus on AI application layer, particularly in sales and marketing](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Excited about full-stack AI-powered businesses](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Portfolio includes companies like Anthropic with AI-layered services](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [Impressed by GrowthX's vision of AI-powered marketing agency](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to dive deeper into GrowthX's technology and business model](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [Explore potential investment opportunities between Bessemer and GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [Share more details on GrowthX's client engagement model and results](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Discuss GrowthX's plans for scaling and maintaining quality as they grow](https://fathom.video/share/TqJpjyKfmXLNeQv9yNV_gpagXzi3xGRs?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
